sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75968" key="ou)raxoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰχοειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75968.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐραχός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
